items.school: Lovely Professional University, Phagwara, Punjab, India
items.desc: I am currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering at Lovely Professional University. I have completed 3 semesters and have a CGPA of 8.5. I have taken courses in Data Structures, Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Database Management Systems, Operating Systems, and Computer Networks, among others. I am also a member of the Google Developers Student Club (GDSC) at LPU, where I am learning and working on exciting projects with a team of talented developers.
items.degree: Bachelor of Technology - BTech in Computer Science and Engineering

items.desc: I completed my Class 12th High school education at MASD Public School,Panipat where I studied Physics, Chemistry & Math with Computer Science.
I completed my Class 10th high school education at MASD Public School,Panipat where I studied Python, MySQL and did few Projects Also
